title: LabUtils
description: Decorative laboraty utilities like computers and an entire vent shaft system
body:
# LabUtils 
![LabUtils Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b991a38d79bd9598c4f40f3e1f822711f2554b.png) **LabUtils is a mod adding decorative (and in the future maybe functional) blocks**

## Features
- Walkable vent shaft system
- Screwdriver (to open vent shafts)
- Papers (lying papers, model changes on rightclick)
- File folders
- Microscope
- Table in different shapes
- Light Strips (single and double)
- Monitor
- Keyboard
- Monitor with keyboard
- Laptop
- Fire Extinguisher
- Cage
---

**Get notified about updates:** Join the [Discord Server]([https://discord.com/users/891286991084351518](https://discord.com/invite/shva8mE7Q7))!

## Tutorial
[https://youtu.be/t_4ujzKIIkA](https://youtu.be/t_4ujzKIIkA)

## FAQ
- **Can I use shaders?**
> _Yes, LabUtils works perfectly fine with Iris Shaders!_
- **Will there be a forge version?**
> _No, there are no current plans for that version_
- I want a feature. How may I tell you?
> _You can contact me on [Discord]([https://discord.com/users/891286991084351518](https://discord.com/invite/shva8mE7Q7)) or [mail me](mailto:craftXplorer@visionprojects.net)!_
